ddls:
CREATE TABLE "encoding_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encoding configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the encoding configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration parameter */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoding configuration */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_parameters_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES encoding_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encoding_performance" (
  "perf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoding configuration */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the encoded video */,
  "usertime" REAL /* User time taken for encoding */,
  "systemtime" REAL /* System time taken for encoding */,
  "elapsedtime" TEXT /* Elapsed time taken for encoding */,
  "cpu" REAL /* CPU usage during encoding */,
  "frames" INTEGER /* Number of frames encoded */,
  "fps" REAL /* Frames per second */,
  "kbs" REAL /* Kilobits per second */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "perf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_perf_id FOREIGN KEY ("perf_id") REFERENCES encoding_performance ("perf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encoding_scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encoding scenario */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scenario was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scenario was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encoding_config_scenario" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoding configuration */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id", "scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_config" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoding configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, create_config) */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video input */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the video input */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video input */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the video file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the video file (e.g., mp4, avi) */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the video input was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the video input was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encoding_input" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoding configuration */,
  "input_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video input */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id", "input_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the resolution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  "aspect_ratio" REAL /* Aspect ratio of the resolution (e.g., 16:9) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resolution was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resolution was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encoding_resolution" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoding configuration */,
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id", "resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_settings" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality setting */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the quality setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quality setting */,
  "bitrate" INTEGER /* Bitrate of the quality setting in kbps */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality setting was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encoding_quality" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoding configuration */,
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quality setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id", "quality_id")
)
